3328520.name: MATH
3328520.description: Mathematics is a computer video game for children and young people. It is an entertaining, fun and educational adventure game where the player learns the basics of the multiplication table without realizing it by playing the game. This type of educational means helps future generations solve the problem of weakness in the multiplication table and makes it easy to memorize. The game contains a group of monsters in various forms that fight the hero. They are evil and strange forms such as the shape of the savage calculator. The game also contains the possibility of changing the weather with a very beautiful and exciting atmosphere.
3328520.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
